title: TMC Fancy Books
description: Gives TrappedMC custom enchants their own unique texture
body:
### This pack is intended for the TrappedMC prison server (`trappedmc.com`) Note: This pack is fan-made for personal use and has not been officially supported by TrappedMC ## [IMPORTANT] Dependencies There are two versions of this pack. The recommended pack is the Variants-CIT version which **requires the [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) mod**. Support Minecraft 1.21.4+ The standalone pack does not have any dependencies, but requires Minecraft 1.21.5+ # Features A unique texture for each custom enchant Information about the book is indicated as following: - Enchant: Icon - Book Type: Colour - Rarity: Border - Level: Ribbons If the icons are hard to see, lower the Glint Speed and Glint Strength in Minecraft accessibility settings. I recommend 50% or below. ![Books on AH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b36974de1a4a5985d5d2362fd1c3cb98841c5cf9.png) ![Prestige Crate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60c46d63031bd8eaff874041add28ede3a4dec4b.png)
#ResourceMineBestMine
